summary: Full backend + frontend testing of 3 Instagram features: Instagram API Settings, Instagram Pipeline tabs, and Instagram DM Chat. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI renders all required components. Stage creation via dialog had playwright fill issue but API confirmed working via direct curl.

issues: Dialog input placeholder 'Ex: Nova mensagem' - minor UX note, placeholder should say 'Ex: Prospecção' or similar

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2711 lines - should be split into modules for maintainability (instagram routes, pipeline routes, settings routes, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_IG_Stage in instagram pipeline via API (stage_b46664551b), and saved instagram-api settings with verify_token=meu_token_123 via PUT
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 Instagram features tested and working: (1) Configurações page has instagram-api-section with all fields (page_access_token, instagram_account_id, verify_token) and webhook URL shows correct URL. (2) Pipeline page has 'Pipeline Principal' | 'Pipeline Instagram' tabs - both working. (3) Instagram Pipeline board shows empty state with 'Nova Etapa' button that opens correct dialog. Backend endpoints all return 200. Webhook challenge verification working.

frontend_tests_passed: Configurações: all fields (page_access_token, instagram_account_id, verify_token) present
Pipeline: 'Pipeline Principal' tab visible and shows kanban board
Pipeline: 'Pipeline Instagram' tab visible and shows empty state
Pipeline Instagram: 'Nova Etapa' button opens dialog with name input and color picker
POST /api/pipeline/stages with pipeline_type=instagram - creates stage correctly (confirmed via API)
